productDisplayName: Puma Men Contest HI Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: If you're looking for a way to enhance your foot-wear with a more classic, old-school appeal, the puma Contest Hi-tops in leather are a good place to start!UpperCrinkled leather upper for style and durability with suede formstripe panelPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and a snug FitPerforations on toe and midfoot for enhanced ventilationUpper stitched to the outsole for extra durabilityHigh ankle support for comfortBranding tag on tongue, printing on ankle and back heelMidsoleBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort.TPU and EVA midsole combined to offer support and ample cushioningOutsoleDurable rubber outsole for absolute grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
